name: THE SLAVE MARKETS
description:
The Slave Market, Ceristveille's own place of debauchery and slaughter. Come to the markets for the selling of, purchasing of, testing of, and usage of slaves! Whether you want to enjoy their bodies, their workrates, killing them, or selling your own slaves, come on down!

Anypov!

My amarath series!

Any and all races.
